word: H2296 - חָגַר - châgar - khaw-gar' - Be able to put on

sections.paragraph:
Original: חגר

Transliteration: châgar

Phonetic: khaw-gar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to gird, gird on, gird oneself, put on a belt
    1. (Qal)
      1. to gird
      2. to gird on, bind on
      3. to gird oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 604

Part(s) of speech: Verb
